name: Sequence Player
shortDescription: Layered timeline sequencer for imported video, image, and audio files with clip trimming, frame controls, audio volume, render range control, and export settings.
aiDescription: Sequence Player is a free YCSWU creative tool for arranging imported videos, images, and audio on a layered timeline, trimming clips, sequencing shots, framing output, mixing audio, setting render ranges, and preparing video or frame-based exports.
creator: Ali Guzel
useCases: sequence imported videos, images, and audio
bulk select media and add it as a sequenced timeline run
trim clip start and end points
adjust per-layer volume for video and audio tracks
optionally include or exclude audio during export
set frame ratio, media pan and scale, background color, transparency, and gradients
set output width, fps, length, and render range
prepare MP4, MOV, GIF, PNG frame ZIP, and JPG frame ZIP export settings
systemRequirements: Modern desktop browser for the web build
Windows 10 or newer recommended for the desktop build

changes: Initial Sequence Player build with media import, layered timeline arrangement, clip trimming, render range control, export settings, and web/Windows packaging.
